name: Peperoni-Vidalia Onion Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions with oil and butter in a heavy skillet over low heat until well done, stirring often. Do not brown.
2. Sprinkle with flour and continue cooking slowly for about 1-2 minutes.
3. Cool well.
4. Beat eggs and add half-and-half, yogurt, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
5. Add to cooled onions.
6. Sprinkle half the cheese on the bottom of the prebaked pastry shell and fill with egg-onion mixture.
7. Arrange pepperoni slices on top.
8. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
9. Bake for 10 minutes at 450°F, then reduce heat to 300°F and bake for 20 minutes longer.
